dependencies.packagePolicy: SDK headers/import libraries excluded; V8 runtime support included only in explicit V8 package lanes; static Linux SDK packages may link V8 into bin/sloppy
dependencies.currentStatus: Windows x64 SDK artifact source exists; Linux x64 SDK can be built locally with tools/unix/build-v8.sh; macOS V8 runtime package lanes are planned

dependencies.packagePolicy: include only when required by the selected V8 runtime artifact
dependencies.currentStatus: not bundled in default non-V8 packages

dependencies.packagePolicy: Windows package bundles vcpkg runtime DLLs where the build produced them; Unix packages currently declare host-linked/system-provided status
Windows package bundles vcpkg runtime DLLs where present; Unix packages currently declare host-linked/system-provided status
dependencies.currentStatus: live provider readiness uses live-provider lanes

dependencies.packagePolicy: Windows package bundles vcpkg runtime DLLs where present; Unix packages currently declare host-linked/system-provided status
dependencies.currentStatus: live PostgreSQL lanes are opt-in and not default package evidence

dependencies.packagePolicy: ODBC driver installation is not bundled in default packages
dependencies.currentStatus: driver availability must be reported as dependency-backed or unavailable evidence

dependencies.packagePolicy: Windows packages copy runtime DLLs from the selected build tree; source/cache trees are forbidden
dependencies.currentStatus: package smoke validates DLL presence for Windows and absence of vcpkg source/cache leakage

dependencies.packagePolicy: system libraries are declared through manifest dependency status when not bundled
dependencies.currentStatus: Linux/macOS package status remains experimental until hosted package smoke evidence is reviewed

boundaries: This audit is not final legal review.
Publishing requires a separate release approval.
This audit does not make live providers, TLS, V8, or every platform supported.
